Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar appeared by zoom for Casey Yared.

Mr. Lazar requested a 30-day continuance stating that the creditor's claims have been paid, that he is waiting for receipt of the release of claims, that he has a petition for final distribution and that the real property is going to be distributed to the heirs. Status on close of estate is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
